subcodes.first_line: We make mention of the city which hath triumphed through the lamp of divine knowledge, having been honored by the breaths of them that have believed in the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر المدینه التی فازت بنبراس العرفان بما تشرفت بانفاس الذین آمنوا بالرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
